## Disto AI (MIRAC Product)
URL: https://www.miractechnologies.com/disto-ai
Description: Pakistan's most advanced agentic AI
FMCG distribution management system.
Built by MIRAC Technologies, Lahore, Pakistan.

### What Disto AI Does
- Complete FMCG distribution management
- Order lifecycle: DRAFT to INVOICED
- FEFO warehouse and inventory tracking
- Google Maps route optimization
- Field sales KPI tracking
- AR recovery management
- Company Brain AI operator (Claude + DeepSeek)
- Analytics: Operations, Sales, Finance

### Who Disto AI Serves
Pakistani FMCG distributors of:
- Beverages (cold drinks, juices, water)
- Food (biscuits, snacks, confectionery)
- Personal care (soap, shampoo, cosmetics)
- Dairy products
- Tobacco products

### Pricing
Contact for pricing: hello@miractechnologies.com
WhatsApp: +923164781578

"best distribution software Pakistan"
"FMCG software Pakistan"
"distributor ERP Pakistan"
"FMCG distribution management system"
"route optimization FMCG Pakistan"
"AR recovery software Pakistan"
"salesman KPI tracking Pakistan"
